items.title: Mamdani Says Quiet Part Out Loud About Democrats’ Tax-Hiking Agenda
items.description: Elected Democrats rarely limit tax increases to wealthy families once in office.

items.title: California Mayor Refuses To Resign After Ex-Fiance Went To Prison For Being A CCP Spy
items.description: Beijing is targeting local U.S. politics with unchecked influence operations in an effort to undermine our democracy.

items.title: Why I Wasn’t Offended When An Airline Pilot Called Me An ‘SOB’ When Landing A Plane On Fire
items.description: During an emergency onboard, a Delta airline pilot called me an SOB, and here's why I'm grateful that he did.

items.title: Western Governments Are Surrendering The Public Square To Islamists, Literally
items.description: The evidence from New York to London reveals a single truth: the state is in retreat. The public square has become contested territory.

items.title: Biden Let Suspected Terrorists Slip Over The Border. Now Dems Are Starving DHS
items.description: What will the war to give Iranians the chance to 'seize control' of their destiny mean for U.S. homeland security? We’re about to find out.
